children.name: Text
children.characters: Early adopter highly sensitive to trends, actively exploring new services. Values efficiency and carefully analyzes price-to-quality ratios. Influencer personality who acquires information through SNS and actively shares with peers.

children.name: Text
children.characters: Frequent overtime on weekdays leads to concentrated content consumption on weekends. Mobile viewing during 2-hour daily commute, background playback on work-from-home days. Uses streaming services 40+ hours monthly, currently subscribed to both Netflix and YouTube Premium.

children.name: Text
children.characters: Average monthly entertainment spending: $85. High willingness to pay for premium services, readily pays extra for ad-free environment and exclusive content. Started 3 new subscription services in past 6 months, pattern of immediate paid conversion after free trials.
